titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Al-Jahm
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Al-Jahm

segments: ه عن الحسن بن الجهم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن الحسن بن الجهم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن الحسن بن الجهم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن الحسن بن الجهم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Jahm has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Jahm.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Jahm has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Jahm.
